project_state_summary: Replace with at least 100 characters describing the current public repository state, scientific constraints and latest stable baseline.
current_task_summary: Replace with at least 50 characters describing the exact requested change and intended outcome.
must_not_change: Replace with explicit protected scientific, security and public-boundary constraints.
rollback_plan: Replace with an exact rollback procedure of at least 80 characters, including the commit or PR revert path and state restoration steps.
